commands.review_summary:
The PR replaces unique CLI device user-code lookup with bounded newest-first duplicate handling, expires stale pending matches, and adds focused approval and denial regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. Duplicate indexed rows deterministically break current main's `.unique()` lookup, and the contributor exercised the repaired duplicate-row path in a real local Convex deployment.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair remains; the existing automerge opt-in can gate the exact reviewed head on required checks and mergeability.

target.title: fix: tolerate duplicate CLI device user codes
target.body:
## Summary

- Fix CLI device approval/denial to tolerate duplicate `userCodeHash` rows instead of relying on Convex `.unique()`.
- Expire stale matching rows, then approve or deny the newest active pending row so a stuck duplicate code no longer surfaces as a Convex server error.
- Add regression coverage for duplicate device user-code rows.

Fixes #2587

## Tests

- `bun run test convex/cliDeviceAuth.test.ts convex/httpApi.handlers.test.ts`
- `bunx tsc --noEmit --pretty false`
- `bun run format:check -- convex/cliDeviceAuth.ts convex/cliDeviceAuth.test.ts`
- `bun run lint`
target.author: momothemage

commands.author: momothemage

target.title: feat: expose skill description setup metadata
target.body:
## Summary

- Expose skill long-description data on the v1 skill list/detail payloads.
- Add conservative `metadata.setup` entries derived from parsed manifest requirements.
- Populate list descriptions from the real `latestVersionSummary`/digest path and read GitHub-backed detail descriptions from cached `githubSkillContents`.
- Update public schema packages and add regression coverage for list/detail API output.

Fixes #2570.

## Setup metadata contract

This version intentionally narrows `metadata.setup[]` to the minimum useful public contract:

```json
{ "key": "HA_TOKEN", "required": true }
```

It does **not** expose `target`, inferred `type`, generated `label`, `help`, or placeholder fields. That keeps the first release from turning heuristic credential-storage or UI decisions into a stable public API. Downstream clients can prompt for the listed keys, but env-vs-config storage and field rendering remain client-side policy until maintainers approve a richer setup schema.

`required` is true for entries sourced from `requires.env` / `requires.config`; `envVars[]`-only declarations follow their `required` flag.

## Behavior proof

Local HTTP proof was run against this branch through the real `convex/httpApiV1.ts` exported handlers with fixture-backed Convex action context.

- Public v1 list endpoint includes `description` plus conservative `metadata.setup`:

```bash
curl -s 'http://127.0.0.1:52160/api/v1/skills?limit=1'
```

Result shape:

```json
{
  "items": [
    {
      "slug": "home-assistant",
      "description": "Long-form frontmatter description for the catalog list.",
      "metadata": {
        "setup": [
          { "key": "HA_TOKEN", "required": true },
          { "key": "HA_URL", "required": true }
        ]
      }
    }
  ],
  "nextCursor": null
}
```

- Hosted skill detail uses full `SKILL.md` markdown for `skill.description` and the same conservative setup shape:

```bash
curl -s http://127.0.0.1:52160/api/v1/skills/home-assistant
```

Result shape:

```json
{
  "skill": {
    "slug": "home-assistant",
    "description": "# Home Assistant\n\nFull SKILL.md setup instructions."
  },
  "metadata": {
    "setup": [
      { "key": "HA_TOKEN", "required": true },
      { "key": "HA_URL", "required": true }
    ]
  }
}
```

- GitHub-backed skill detail with no hosted `latestVersionId` uses cached `githubSkillContents` markdown:

```bash
curl -s http://127.0.0.1:52160/api/v1/skills/aiq-deploy
```

Result shape:

```json
{
  "skill": {
    "slug": "aiq-deploy",
    "description": "# AIQ Deploy\n\nLong GitHub-backed README from githubSkillContents."
  },
  "latestVersion": null,
  "owner": { "handle": "nvidia" }
}
```

No secret values are exposed.

## Tests

- `bunx vitest run convex/httpApiV1.handlers.test.ts convex/skills.publicListCursor.test.ts packages/schema/src/schemas.test.ts packages/clawhub/src/schema/schemas.test.ts`
- `bun run format:check -- convex/httpApiV1/skillsV1.ts convex/httpApiV1.handlers.test.ts packages/schema/src/schemas.ts packages/clawhub/src/schema/schemas.ts`
- `bunx tsc --noEmit`
- `bunx tsc -p packages/schema/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/clawhub/tsconfig.json --noEmit`
- `bun run lint`
